import { useState } from “react”; // ─── DESIGN TOKENS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const css = ` @import url(‘https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;0,9..40,600;1,9..40,300&display=swap’); *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } :root { –ink: #0f0e0d; –paper: #f5f0e8; –sand: #e8dfc8; –sand2: #dfd5bc; –rust: #c9440f; –rust-dim: #c9440f18; –rust-border: #c9440f35; –gold: #c49a14; –gold-dim: #c49a1415; –sage: #3d5c35; –sage-dim: #3d5c3515; –muted: #7a7060; –muted2: #a09880; –card: #faf7f2; –white: #ffffff; –border: #d8d0bc; –border2: #ece5d4; –red: #d63030; –red-dim: #d6303012; –blue: #2563a8; –blue-dim: #2563a812; –radius-sm: 10px; –radius-md: 14px; –radius-lg: 20px; } body { background: var(–paper); font-family: ‘DM Sans’, sans-serif; color: var(–ink); -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } /* ── SCROLLBAR ── */ ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(–sand2); border-radius: 4px; } /* ── LAYOUT ── */ .app { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: var(–paper); } /* ── NAV ── */ .nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 28px; border-bottom: 1.5px solid var(–border); background: var(–paper); position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .nav-logo { font-family: ‘Syne’, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 21px; letter-spacing: -0.5px; cursor: pointer; } .nav-logo span { color: var(–rust); } .nav-tabs { display: flex; gap: 2px; background: var(–sand); border-radius: 100px; padding: 3px; } .nav-tab { padding: 7px 18px; border-radius: 100px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; color: var(–muted); transition: all 0.18s; font-family: ‘DM Sans’, sans-serif; } .nav-tab.active { background: var(–ink); color: var(–paper); } .nav-tab:not(.active):hover { color: var(–ink); } .nav-avatar { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(–rust); color: white; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: ‘Syne’, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid var(–rust-border); } /* ── PAGE WRAPPER ── */ .page { max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 36px 28px 80px; width: 100%; } .page-header { margin-bottom: 32px; } .page-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1.8px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(–rust); margin-bottom: 10px; } .page-eyebrow::before { content:’’; width: 18px; height: 1.5px; background: var(–rust); } .page-title { font-family: ‘Syne’, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: clamp(26px, 4vw, 40px); letter-spacing: -1px; line-height: 1.05; } .page-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(–rust); } .page-sub { color: var(–muted); font-size: 15px; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.6; } /* ── CARDS ── */ .card { background: var(–card); border: 1.5px solid var(–border); border-radius: var(–radius-lg); overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 0.2s; } .card:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 28px #0f0e0d0e; } .card-body { padding: 24px 26px; } .card-footer { padding: 14px 26px; border-top: 1.5px solid var(–border2); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: var(–paper); } /* ── BUTTONS ── */ .btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 100px; font-family: ‘DM Sans’, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: all 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; } .btn-primary { background: var(–rust); color: white; } .btn-primary:hover { background: #b03a0a; transform: translateY(-1px); } .btn-secondary { background: none; border: 1.5px solid var(–border); color: var(–ink); } .btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(–ink); } .btn-ghost { background: none; color: var(–muted); padding: 8px 14px; } .btn-ghost:hover { color: var(–ink); background: var(–sand); border-radius: 8px; } .btn-sage { background: var(–sage); color: white; } .btn-sage:hover { background: #2e4728; } .btn-sm { padding: 7px 14px; font-size: 12px; } .btn-icon { padding: 8px; border-radius: 10px; width: 34px; height: 34px; justify-content: center; } .btn:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none !important; } /* ── BADGES ── */ .badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.8px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 100px; } .badge-rust { background: var(–rust-dim); color: var(–rust); border: 1px solid var(–rust-border); } .badge-sage { background: var(–sage-dim); color: var(–sage); border: 1px solid #3d5c3530; } .badge-gold { background: var(–gold-dim); color: var(–gold); border: 1px solid #c49a1430; } .badge-blue { background: var(–blue-dim); color: var(–blue); border: 1px solid #2563a825; } .badge-red { background: var(–red-dim); color: var(–red); border: 1px solid #d6303025; } /* ── DIVIDER ── */ .divider { height: 1.5px; background: var(–border2); margin: 20px 0; } /* ── STAT BLOCKS ── */ .stat-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 28px; } .stat-card { background: var(–card); border: 1.5px solid var(–border); border-radius: var(–radius-md); padding: 20px 22px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .stat-card::after { content: ‘’; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; } .stat-card.green::after { background: var(–sage); } .stat-card.orange::after { background: var(–rust); } .stat-card.gold::after { background: var(–gold); } .stat-card.blue::after { background: var(–blue); } .stat-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1.2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(–muted); margin-bottom: 8px; } .stat-value { font-family: ‘Syne’, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 32px; letter-spacing: -1px; line-height: 1; } .stat-sub { font-size: 12px; color: var(–muted); margin-top: 6px; } /* ── TRANSACTION LIST ── */ .tx-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .tx-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; padding: 14px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(–border2); } .tx-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .tx-icon { width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 11px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 17px; flex-shrink: 0; } .tx-icon.green { background: var(–sage-dim); } .tx-icon.orange { background: var(–rust-dim); } .tx-icon.gold { background: var(–gold-dim); } .tx-info { flex: 1; } .tx-name { font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; } .tx-date { font-size: 12px; color: var(–muted); margin-top: 2px; } .tx-amount { font-family: ‘Syne’, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; } .tx-amount.positive { color: var(–sage); } .tx-amount.negative { color: var(–rust); } .tx-amount.pending { color: var(–gold); } /* ── ESCROW BAR ── */ .escrow-bar-wrap { margin: 20px 0; } .escrow-bar-label { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 12px; color: var(–muted); margin-bottom: 8px; } .escrow-bar { height: 8px; background: var(–sand); border-radius: 100px; overflow: hidden; } .escrow-bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 100px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(–sage), #6a9e5f); transition: width 0.6s ease; } /* ── CHART ── */ .mini-chart { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 6px; height: 80px; margin: 16px 0 8px; } .mini-bar-wrap { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 5px; } .mini-bar { width: 100%; border-radius: 5px 5px 0 0; background: var(–sage-dim); border: 1.5px solid #3d5c3530; transition: all 0.3s; cursor: pointer; position: relative; } .mini-bar:hover { background: var(–sage-dim); border-color: var(–sage); } .mini-bar.active { background: var(–sage); border-color: var(–sage); } .mini-bar-label { font-size: 10px; color: var(–muted); font-weight: 500; } /* ── SETTINGS ── */ .settings-section { margin-bottom: 32px; } .settings-section-title { font-family: ‘Syne’, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: -0.3px; margin-bottom: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .settings-section-title .section-icon { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 14px; background: var(–sand); } .settings-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(–border2); gap: 16px; } .settings-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; padding-bottom: 0; } .settings-row-left { flex: 1; } .settings-row-label { font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 3px; } .settings-row-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(–muted); line-height: 1.5; } /* ── TOGGLE ── */ .toggle-wrap { position: relative; width: 44px; height: 24px; flex-shrink: 0; cursor: pointer; } .toggle-input { opacity: 0; width: 0; height: 0; position: absolute; } .toggle-slider { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: var(–sand2); border-radius: 100px; transition: 0.2s; border: 1.5px solid var(–border); } .toggle-slider::before { content: ‘’; position: absolute; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: white; top: 2px; left: 2px; transition: 0.2s; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px #0003; } .toggle-input:checked + .toggle-slider { background: var(–sage); border-color: var(–sage); } .toggle-input:checked + .toggle-slider::before { transform: translateX(20px); } /* ── STEPPER ── */ .stepper { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .stepper-btn { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1.5px solid var(–border); background: var(–card); font-size: 17px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.15s; line-height: 1; } .stepper-btn:hover { border-color: var(–ink); background: var(–sand); } .stepper-val { font-family: ‘Syne’, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; min-width: 52px; text-align: center; letter-spacing: -0.5px; } .stepper-unit { font-size: 12px; color: var(–muted); margin-left: -4px; } /* ── MEMBER LIST ── */ .member-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .member-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 13px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(–border2); transition: opacity 0.15s; } .member-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .member-avatar { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: ‘Syne’, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; color: white; flex-shrink: 0; } .member-info { flex: 1; } .member-name { font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; } .member-role { font-size: 12px; color: var(–muted); margin-top: 1px; } .member-status { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 4px; } /* ── RADIO GROUP ── */ .radio-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .radio-option { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 13px 16px; border: 1.5px solid var(–border); border-radius: var(–radius-md); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .radio-option:hover { border-color: var(–ink); } .radio-option.selected { border-color: var(–sage); background: var(–sage-dim); } .radio-dot { width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(–border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; transition: all 0.15s; } .radio-option.selected .radio-dot { border-color: var(–sage); background: var(–sage); } .radio-option.selected .radio-dot::after { content: ‘’; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: white; } .radio-text { flex: 1; } .radio-label { font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; } .radio-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(–muted); margin-top: 2px; } /* ── TRIP CREATION FLOW ── */ .flow-steps { display: flex; gap: 0; margin-bottom: 28px; } .flow-step { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; position: relative; } .flow-step:not(:last-child)::after { content: ‘’; position: absolute; top: 15px; left: 50%; width: 100%; height: 1.5px; background: var(–border); z-index: 0; } .flow-step-dot { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(–border); background: var(–card); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; z-index: 1; transition: all 0.2s; position: relative; } .flow-step.done .flow-step-dot { background: var(–sage); border-color: var(–sage); color: white; } .flow-step.active .flow-step-dot { background: var(–ink); border-color: var(–ink); color: white; } .flow-step-label { font-size: 11px; color: var(–muted); margin-top: 6px; text-align: center; font-weight: 500; } .flow-step.active .flow-step-label { color: var(–ink); font-weight: 600; } .location-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 10px; margin: 16px 0; } .location-option { padding: 16px; border: 1.5px solid var(–border); border-radius: var(–radius-md); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; background: var(–card); } .location-option:hover { border-color: var(–ink); transform: translateY(-1px); } .location-option.selected { border-color: var(–rust); background: var(–rust-dim); } .location-emoji { font-size: 28px; display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; } .location-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; } .location-sub { font-size: 12px; color: var(–muted); margin-top: 3px; } /* ── INVITE ROW ── */ .invite-input-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .invite-input { flex: 1; padding: 11px 16px; border: 1.5px solid var(–border); border-radius: 100px; background: var(–card); font-family: ‘DM Sans’, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; color: var(–ink); } .invite-input:focus { border-color: var(–ink); } .invited-list { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; } .invited-chip { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; background: var(–sand); border-radius: 100px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; } .invited-chip button { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: var(–muted); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; padding: 0 0 0 2px; } .invited-chip button:hover { color: var(–rust); } /* ── MODAL ── */ .modal-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: #0f0e0d70; backdrop-filter: blur(6px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 200; padding: 20px; animation: fadein 0.18s ease; } @keyframes fadein { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } } .modal { background: var(–card); border: 1.5px solid var(–border); border-radius: var(–radius-lg); padding: 32px; max-width: 440px; width: 100%; animation: slideup 0.22s ease; } @keyframes slideup { from { transform: translateY(14px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } } .modal-icon { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 22px; margin-bottom: 18px; } .modal h2 { font-family: ‘Syne’, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 21px; letter-spacing: -0.4px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .modal p { color: var(–muted); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 22px; } .modal-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .modal-actions .btn { flex: 1; justify-content: center; border-radius: 12px; padding: 13px; } /* ── NOTIFICATIONS ── */ .notif-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(–rust); position: absolute; top: -1px; right: -1px; } /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */ @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .animate-in { animation: fadeInUp 0.3s ease forwards; } .animate-in:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; opacity: 0; } .animate-in:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.10s; opacity: 0; } .animate-in:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.15s; opacity: 0; } .animate-in:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.20s; opacity: 0; } `; // ─── DATA ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const TRANSACTIONS = [ { id:1, icon:“✈️”, type:“green”, name:“Tulum deposit received”, date:“Apr 22 · Tulum, Mexico”, amount:”+$40.00”, cls:“positive” }, { id:2, icon:“🏜️”, type:“orange”, name:“You committed to Zion trip”, date:“Apr 20 · Zion National Park”, amount:”-$25.00”, cls:“negative” }, { id:3, icon:“⚖️”, type:“gold”, name:“Bail penalty — Chris R.”, date:“Apr 18 · Zion”, amount:”+$25.00”, cls:“positive” }, { id:4, icon:“🎷”, type:“green”, name:“New Orleans deposit locked”, date:“Apr 15 · New Orleans, LA”, amount:”-$50.00”, cls:“negative” }, { id:5, icon:“💸”, type:“green”, name:“Nashville refund completed”, date:“Mar 30 · Nashville trip”, amount:”+$50.00”, cls:“positive” }, { id:6, icon:“🤝”, type:“gold”, name:“Barcelona group committed”, date:“Mar 12 · Barcelona, Spain”, amount:”+$75.00”, cls:“positive” }, ]; const MONTHS = [“Jan”,“Feb”,“Mar”,“Apr”,“May”,“Jun”]; const MONTH_DATA = [12, 18, 8, 45, 22, 30]; const MEMBERS = [ { id:1, name:“Maya K.”, role:“Organizer”, status:“committed”, deposit:true, color:”#3d5c35”, initial:“M” }, { id:2, name:“Jordan T.”, role:“Member”, status:“committed”, deposit:true, color:”#c9440f”, initial:“J” }, { id:3, name:“Sam L.”, role:“Member”, status:“maybe”, deposit:false, color:”#c49a14”, initial:“S” }, { id:4, name:“Priya D.”, role:“Member”, status:“committed”, deposit:true, color:”#2563a8”, initial:“P” }, { id:5, name:“Chris R.”, role:“Member”, status:“bailed”, deposit:false, color:”#8a5a7a”, initial:“C” }, ]; const LOCATIONS = [ { id:1, emoji:“🌴”, name:“Tulum, Mexico”, sub:“Beach + cenotes” }, { id:2, emoji:“🏔️”, name:“Banff, Canada”, sub:“Mountains + lakes” }, { id:3, emoji:“🏙️”, name:“NYC, New York”, sub:“City vibes” }, { id:4, emoji:“🌊”, name:“Lisbon, Portugal”, sub:“Culture + coast” }, ]; // ─── WALLET PAGE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function WalletPage() { const [activeBar, setActiveBar] = useState(3); const maxVal = Math.max(…MONTH_DATA); return (
Your Wallet

Money in,
money back.

All deposits held in secure escrow. Funds released when trips conclude or returned when bail votes pass.

``` {/* STAT GRID */}
{[ { label:"Total in Escrow", value:"$115", sub:"Across 3 active trips", accent:"green" }, { label:"Returned to You", value:"$125", sub:"From 4 completed trips", accent:"orange" }, { label:"Earned from Bails",value:"$25", sub:"1 bail penalty kept", accent:"gold" }, { label:"Trips Committed", value:"6", sub:"Since joining Packt", accent:"blue" }, ].map((s,i) => (
{s.label}
{s.value}
{s.sub}
))}
{/* ACTIVITY CHART */}
Deposit Activity
Monthly deposit volume · 2025
↑ 48% this month
{MONTHS.map((m,i) => (
setActiveBar(i)} title={`$${MONTH_DATA[i]}`} /> {m}
))}
{activeBar !== null && (
${MONTH_DATA[activeBar]} deposited in {MONTHS[activeBar]}
)}
{/* ESCROW BREAKDOWN */}
Active Escrow
{[ { trip:"Tulum, Mexico 🌴", amount:40, total:360, pct:78, date:"Jul 18–25" }, { trip:"Zion National Park 🏜️", amount:25, total:175, pct:57, date:"Aug 2–6" }, { trip:"New Orleans, LA 🎷", amount:50, total:250, pct:100, date:"Sep 12–15" }, ].map((e,i) => (
{e.trip}
{e.date} · Your deposit: ${e.amount}
${e.total} total
{e.pct}% committed ${e.total} locked
{i < 2 &&
}
))}
{/* TRANSACTION HISTORY */}
Transaction History
{TRANSACTIONS.map(tx => (
{tx.icon}
{tx.name}
{tx.date}
{tx.amount}
))}
Showing 6 of 18 transactions
``` ); } // ─── GROUP SETTINGS PAGE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function SettingsPage() { const [deposit, setDeposit] = useState(40); const [bailRule, setBailRule] = useState(“majority”); const [toggles, setToggles] = useState({ reminders:true, newMember:true, bailAlert:true, autoRelease:false, publicTrip:false }); const [removeModal, setRemoveModal] = useState(null); const [members, setMembers] = useState(MEMBERS); const toggle = (k) => setToggles(t => ({…t, [k]: !t[k]})); const confirmRemove = () => { setMembers(m => m.filter(x => x.id !== removeModal.id)); setRemoveModal(null); }; return (
Trip Settings

Tulum, Mexico

Configure rules, members, and deposit logic for your group. Changes apply immediately.

```
{/* LEFT COLUMN */}
{/* DEPOSIT SETTINGS */}
💰
Deposit Amount
Required deposit per person
Collected when members hit "Commit." Held in escrow until the trip concludes.
${deposit}
{members.filter(m=>m.status==="committed").length} committed × ${deposit} = ${members.filter(m=>m.status==="committed").length * deposit} in escrow
{/* BAIL RULES */}
⚖️
Bail Rules
When someone bails after committing, how is their deposit handled?
{[ { val:"majority", label:"Majority vote", desc:"More than half the group votes to keep or return the deposit." }, { val:"organizer", label:"Organizer decides", desc:"Trip organizer makes the final call — no vote required." }, { val:"auto-keep", label:"Auto-keep", desc:"Bail deposit is automatically split among committed members." }, { val:"auto-return", label:"Always return", desc:"Bail deposit is always returned, no questions asked." }, ].map(opt => (
setBailRule(opt.val)}>
{opt.label}
{opt.desc}
))}
{/* NOTIFICATIONS */}
🔔
Notifications
{[ { key:"reminders", label:"Commit deadline reminders", desc:"Nudge maybes 24h before the commit window closes." }, { key:"newMember", label:"New member joined", desc:"Alert when someone votes or commits to your trip." }, { key:"bailAlert", label:"Bail alerts", desc:"Notify the group when someone submits a bail request." }, { key:"autoRelease",label:"Auto-release escrow", desc:"Release funds automatically 48h after trip ends." }, { key:"publicTrip", label:"Public trip page", desc:"Allow a shareable link for non-members to view (not commit)." }, ].map(row => (
{row.label}
{row.desc}
{/* RIGHT COLUMN */}
{/* MEMBER MANAGEMENT */}
👥
Members ({members.length})
{members.map(m => (
{m.initial}
{m.name}
{m.role}
{m.status==="committed"?"✓ In":m.status==="maybe"?"Maybe":"Bailed"} {m.deposit && 💰 Paid}
{m.role !== "Organizer" && ( )}
))}
{members.filter(m=>m.status==="committed").length} committed · {members.filter(m=>m.status==="maybe").length} maybe · {members.filter(m=>m.status==="bailed").length} bailed
{/* TRIP DETAILS */}
📋
Trip Details
{[ { label:"Trip name", value:"Tulum, Mexico 🌴", editable:true }, { label:"Dates", value:"Jul 18–25, 2025", editable:true }, { label:"Phase", value:Voting Open, editable:false }, { label:"Created by", value:"Maya K.", editable:false }, { label:"Trip ID", value:"PKT-0042", editable:false }, ].map((row,i) => (
{row.label}
{row.value}
{row.editable && }
))}
{/* DANGER ZONE */}
⚠️
Danger Zone
Cancel trip
Returns all deposits. Cannot be undone.
Transfer organizer
Hand off admin controls to another member.
{/* REMOVE MODAL */} {removeModal && (
setRemoveModal(null)}>
e.stopPropagation()}>
👋

Remove {removeModal.name}?

They'll be removed from the trip and notified. {removeModal.deposit ? " Their committed deposit will be returned automatically." : ""}

)}
``` ); } // ─── NEW TRIP FLOW PAGE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function NewTripPage() { const [step, setStep] = useState(0); const [selectedLoc, setSelectedLoc] = useState(null); const [tripName, setTripName] = useState(””); const [dates, setDates] = useState(””); const [depositAmt, setDepositAmt] = useState(30); const [inviteEmail, setInviteEmail] = useState(””); const [invites, setInvites] = useState([“jordan@email.com”,“maya@email.com”]); const [launched, setLaunched] = useState(false); const steps = [“Destination”,“Details”,“Members”,“Review”]; const addInvite = () => { if (inviteEmail.trim() && !invites.includes(inviteEmail.trim())) { setInvites(i => […i, inviteEmail.trim()]); setInviteEmail(””); } }; if (launched) { return (
🚀

Trip launched!

Your trip to {LOCATIONS.find(l=>l.id===selectedLoc)?.name || “your destination”} is live. Your group will get an invite to vote on the destination.

); } return (
New Trip

Let’s get
planning.

``` {/* STEP INDICATOR */}
{steps.map((s,i) => (
{i
{s}
))}
{/* STEP 0: DESTINATION */} {step === 0 && (
Vote on a destination
Add locations your group can vote on. The winner becomes your trip destination.
{LOCATIONS.map(loc => (
setSelectedLoc(loc.id)}> {loc.emoji}
{loc.name}
{loc.sub}
))}
{selectedLoc ? "1 location selected" : "Pick at least 1"}
)} {/* STEP 1: DETAILS */} {step === 1 && (
Trip details
Trip name
setTripName(e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. Summer beach trip 🌊"/>
Dates
setDates(e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. Aug 10–17, 2025"/>
Commitment deposit
Required deposit per person
Set higher for bigger commitment
${depositAmt}
)} {/* STEP 2: MEMBERS */} {step === 2 && (
Invite your crew
They'll receive a link to vote on the destination and commit with a deposit once you lock in.
setInviteEmail(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&addInvite()}/>
{invites.length > 0 && (
{invites.map((inv,i) => (
{inv}
))}
)}
)} {/* STEP 3: REVIEW */} {step === 3 && (
Review & launch
{[ { label:"Destination options", value: LOCATIONS.find(l=>l.id===selectedLoc)?.name + " + 3 others" }, { label:"Trip name", value: tripName || "(untitled)" }, { label:"Dates", value: dates || "TBD" }, { label:"Deposit per person", value: `$${depositAmt}` }, { label:"Invites sent", value: `${invites.length} people` }, { label:"Bail rule", value: "Majority vote" }, ].map((r,i) => (
{r.label}
{r.value}
))}
✓ Deposits are held in escrow and only released after the trip concludes or a bail vote passes.
)}
``` ); } // ─── TRIPS PAGE (condensed from previous) ──────────────────────────────────── function TripsPage({ onSettings }) { return (
Your Group Trips

No more
flaking allowed.

Vote, commit, and hold each other accountable. Trips that actually happen.

{[{label:“All trips”,count:3},{label:“Voting”,count:1},{label:“Commit phase”,count:1},{label:“Locked”,count:1}].map((f,i)=>( ))}
{[ { name:“Tulum, Mexico 🌴”, phase:“vote”, badge:“badge-gold”, label:“Voting Open”, deposit:40, dates:“Jul 18–25”, committed:5, total:9 }, { name:“Zion National Park 🏜️”, phase:“commit”, badge:“badge-rust”, label:“Commit Phase”, deposit:25, dates:“Aug 2–6”, committed:4, total:7 }, { name:“New Orleans, LA 🎷”, phase:“locked”, badge:“badge-sage”, label:“Trip Locked 🔒”, deposit:50, dates:“Sep 12–15”, committed:5, total:5 }, ].map((trip,i) => (
{trip.label}
{trip.name}
📅 {trip.dates} · {trip.committed}/{trip.total} committed
${trip.deposit}
Deposit
{[”#3d5c35”,”#c9440f”,”#c49a14”,”#2563a8”,”#8a5a7a”].slice(0,trip.committed).map((c,j)=>(
0?-8:0,display:“flex”,alignItems:“center”,justifyContent:“center”,fontSize:11,color:“white”,fontWeight:700}}> {[“M”,“J”,“S”,“P”,“C”][j]}
))}
{trip.phase===“commit” && } {trip.phase===“locked” && }
))}
); } // ─── ROOT APP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── export default function App() { const [tab, setTab] = useState(“trips”); return ( <>
setTab(“trips”)}>packt
{[ {id:“trips”, label:“Trips”}, {id:“new”, label:“New Trip”}, {id:“wallet”, label:“Wallet”}, {id:“settings”,label:“Settings”}, ].map(t => ( ))}
Y
``` {tab === "trips" && setTab("settings")}/>} {tab === "new" && } {tab === "wallet" && } {tab === "settings" && }
``` ); }
